events.description: segment opens, notification bell icon fades in with spring scale
notification pulse ring expands outward from bell
brain icon slides in from right side
dopamine burst — 8 particles explode outward from brain, dopamine label pops in
anticipation insight text fades in below — key message
scene 1 crossfades out, scene 2 (red badge) crossfades in
app icon with chat bubble fades in center-left
red notification badge pops onto app icon corner with spring bounce, starts pulsing
open loop arc draws clockwise — incomplete circle in red
open loop label and lock-open icon appear in center
unresolved tension badge fades in with growing red glow
arc completes to full circle, color shifts red to green — loop closes, satisfaction moment
scene 2 crossfades out, scene 3 (Zeigarnik) crossfades in
Zeigarnik Effect title scales in with spring animation
brain with spinning orbit ring appears — obsession visual
4 task items appear staggered — 2 complete (green check), 2 incomplete (red empty)
incomplete tasks glow red with UNFINISHED badges, brain obsession glow intensifies
